expectations.evidence: NotificationList.tsx implements FilterType = 'all' | 'unread' with state toggling and filtering logic
NotificationList.tsx imports useGetNotifications from @/hooks/apis/queries/useGetNotifications; no direct fetch in component
Hook named useGetNotifications follows use{Verb}{Resource} pattern
Error check renders data-testid='notifications-error' before filter buttons; filter UI not rendered in error state
handleFilterAll and handleFilterUnread functions used as event handlers
